decisions.decision: Removed Hilt Gradle plugin for AGP 9 compatibility
decisions.rationale: com.google.dagger.hilt.android uses BaseExtension removed in AGP 9 — using explicit Hilt_* base class pattern instead
TabRow deprecated in Material3; PrimaryTabRow is the replacement
Not in stable API; hiltViewModel() works via Activity ViewModelStoreOwner
Plan 02-02 omitted it but ViewModel needed it for signOut()

next_action: Run /gsd:autonomous or /gsd:plan-phase 3 --auto to start Phase 3: Registry + Item Management
context_notes: Phase 2 fully complete and verified (22/22 must-haves). Phase 3 has no plans yet — needs discuss/plan/execute cycle. User wants to run Phase 3 autonomously. Key build context: no Hilt Gradle plugin (AGP 9 compat), minSdk 23, explicit Hilt_* base classes required for any new @AndroidEntryPoint classes.
